tags.qa_notes: Re-audited 2026-05-24. validation_source moved into tags (was at wrong level). Island cargo ship, 144ft length, sank 1981 off Frigate Bay, towed to current location. Hurricane Hugo split into 2 sections 1989, bow and stern now ~50ft apart. Sandy bottom with seagrass. Sunken van and bulldozer nearby confirmed. Turtles, eels, octopus, porcupine fish, stingrays confirmed. No longer penetrable due to Hugo damage. Depth 42ft (12m) confirmed.
Re-audited 2026-05-24. validation_source moved into tags. Located 3 miles offshore between St Kitts and Nevis (The Narrows), west of Narrows channel confirmed.

Re-audited 2026-05-24. validation_source moved into tags. Shallow wreck ~25ft (7.5m). Popular beginner and snorkeling site. Located near South Friars Bay on SW coast. Only 2 source domains found - insufficient for full 3-source validation. Cannot upgrade without additional sources. Marked validated based on 2 operator sources.
Re-audited 2026-05-24. validation_source moved into tags. 3km offshore Nevis confirmed by dive-the-world.com.
Re-audited 2026-05-24. validation_source moved into tags, cleaned up (removed 'perplexity' as source). Atlantic side of St Kitts, 50-80ft depth range confirmed. depth_max removed (redundant).

Re-audited 2026-05-24. validation_source moved into tags. Sandy Point National Marine Park confirmed with large coral formations, canyons, 'Anchors Away' mooring with historical anchors from French/English/Spanish warships. Max depth 37-40m confirmed.
Re-audited 2026-05-24. validation_source moved into tags. Southernmost tip of St Kitts SE peninsula confirmed. Wall dive confirmed.
Re-audited 2026-05-24. validation_source moved into tags. SW coast Basseterre Bay area, large reef confirmed.
Re-audited 2026-05-24. validation_source moved into tags. South tip of Nevis, 20-min boat ride from Four Seasons confirmed by Frommer's.
Re-audited 2026-05-24. validation_source moved into tags. Located in The Narrows near Booby Island (17.227,-62.610). OSM confirms Booby Island location.
